description: [ELON] Fix Clerk authentication middleware to properly validate session tokens and attach user context to requests. Ensure requireAuth middleware correctly verifies Clerk JWT and handles token expiry/refresh scenarios. Add proper error logging to identify why tokens are being rejected.
successCriteria: requireAuth middleware successfully validates valid Clerk session tokens
User context (userId, role) is properly attached to req.auth
Invalid/expired tokens return 401 with clear error message
Middleware logs authentication attempts for debugging
